wordplay_note: Frank and free — she acts on instinct and truth
card_description: Juliana Frink (meaning "Juliana = youthful; Frink = free/frank") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man in the High Castle*. Frank Frink's ex-wife who discovers The Grasshopper Lies Heavy and confronts its author. Name note: Frank and free — she acts on instinct and truth. The intuitive seeker who reaches the truth that their reality is false. First appears in *The Man in the High Castle*.
first_work: The Man in the High Castle
work_list: The Man in the High Castle
